mapper.sql: id, item_id, item_name, issuer_name, collection_total, is_private, serial_number, serial_no, serial_total, token_id, nft_id, nft_type, mid, username, avatar_url, image_url, animation_url, crawl_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bili_nft_detail ( item_id, item_name, issuer_name, collection_total, is_private, serial_number, serial_no, serial_total, token_id, nft_id, nft_type, mid, username, avatar_url, image_url, animation_url, crawl_time ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{issuerName}, #{collectionTotal}, #{privateFlag}, #{serialNumber}, #{serialNo}, #{serialTotal}, #{tokenId}, #{nftId}, #{nftType}, #{mid}, #{username}, #{avatarUrl}, #{imageUrl}, #{animationUrl}, #{crawlTime} )

INSERT INTO bili_nft_detail ( item_id, item_name, issuer_name, collection_total, is_private, serial_number, serial_no, serial_total, token_id, nft_id, nft_type, mid, username, avatar_url, image_url, animation_url, crawl_time ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{issuerName}, #{collectionTotal}, #{privateFlag}, #{serialNumber}, #{serialNo}, #{serialTotal}, #{tokenId}, #{nftId}, #{nftType}, #{mid}, #{username}, #{avatarUrl}, #{imageUrl}, #{animationUrl}, #{crawlTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE item_name = VALUES(item_name), issuer_name = VALUES(issuer_name), collection_total = VALUES(collection_total), is_private = VALUES(is_private), serial_number = VALUES(serial_number), serial_no = VALUES(serial_no), serial_total = VALUES(serial_total), token_id = VALUES(token_id), nft_type = VALUES(nft_type), mid = VALUES(mid), username = VALUES(username), avatar_url = VALUES(avatar_url), image_url = VALUES(image_url), animation_url = VALUES(animation_url), crawl_time = VALUES(crawl_time)
mapper.update: UPDATE bili_nft_detail SET item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, issuer_name = #{issuerName}, collection_total = #{collectionTotal}, is_private = #{privateFlag}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, serial_no = #{serialNo}, serial_total = #{serialTotal}, token_id = #{tokenId}, nft_id = #{nftId}, nft_type = #{nftType}, mid = #{mid}, username = #{username}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, animation_url = #{animationUrl}, crawl_time = #{crawlTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bili_nft_detail ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT item_id, nft_id, image_url FROM bili_nft_detail WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != '' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM bili_nft_detail ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
